calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2020 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jul-30-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant James Turnbough, a/k/a James W. Turnbough.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Stephen R. Goldsmith, Esq. appeared via CourtCall for plaintiff Velocity Investments, LLC.
Matthew DiPoalo, Director of Outsourcing for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Mr. DiPoalo appeared for this morning's proceedings via CourtCall.
No appearance by defendant James Turnbough, a/k/a James W. Turnbough.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Money was filed on April 8, 2019 and personally on defendant James Turnbough, a/k/a James W. Turnbough, on April 25, 2019.
Default was entered on May 31, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on March 5, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Velocity Investments LLC, and against the defaulted defendant James Turnbough, a/k/a James W. Turnbough, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $29,481.22. (Amount Pled in Complaint).
Costs - $559.50.

Total - $30,040.72.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
